manualRestos.name: Huey, Dewey & Louie's Good Time Café

restoMenus.Tomorrowland Terrace: Snacks variés. **Bao Burger Bmax, nuggets mickey, churros mickey (canelle)**
restoMenus.Huey, Dewey & Louie's Good Time Café: Snacks américains. **Muscat au citron, shaved Ice, bao burger en pate de mickey ("chinese bun"), pizza mickey, macaron mickey**
restoMenus.Eastside Café: Art Deco-style restaurant with a range of popular Western dishes.
restoMenus.Sweetheart Café: Bakery-cafe run by a friendly couple. Freshly baked breads and sweet desserts.
restoMenus.Jolly Holiday Bakery Café: Bakery and counter service. Breads, pastries and sweet treats.
restoMenus.Skipper's Tropical Hideout: Snack restaurant opened by a former Jungle Cruise Skipper.
restoMenus.Plaza Restaurant: Japanese cuisine. A vibrant American town's beloved restaurant.
restoMenus.Pinocchio Village Kitchen: Counter service restaurant. Rice dishes and snacks.
restoMenus.The Skipper's Galley: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Boiler Room Bites: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Cowboy Cookhouse: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Pecos Bill Cafe: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Plazma Ray's Diner: Seasonal dishes. **Udon avec tête de mickey**
restoMenus.Refrescos: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Hudson River Harvest: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Nautilus Galley: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Food Booth (Adventureland side): Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Food Booth (Tomorrowland side): Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.The Gazebo: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Waterside Terrace: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Breezeway Bites: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Expedition Eats: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Lost River Cookhouse: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Oaken's OK Foods: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Refreshment Station: Menu items to enjoy on the go.
restoMenus.Rackety's Raccoon Saloon: Snacks et boissons américains. **glaces à l'iatalienne et sundae**
